title: Senior Radiologist at Stryker India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Stryker India South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Stryker India South Asia Partners in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Stryker India South Asia Partners:
Stryker India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Stryker India South Asia Partners!
